title: Fix handling of clocks embedded in SV structs

features.name: clock from struct member in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with posedge clock where the clock signal originates from a packed struct member
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic clk1x; logic reset; } cnr_t;
always_ff @(posedge cnr.clk1x) begin if (reset) B <= 'b0; else B <= A; end

features.name: clock port assignment from struct member
features.description: Code should include a submodule instantiation where a clock input port is driven by a struct member

features.name: struct packed with clock and reset fields
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing both clock and reset logic fields
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic clk1x; logic reset; } cnr_t;
